en: Tanjiro lives with his big family in the snowy mountains.
Every morning he wakes up before the sun rises.
He carries heavy charcoal down the mountain to the town.
He sells the charcoal to the kind people there.
His mother cooks warm food for the children.
Nezuko always takes care of her younger brothers and sisters.
The family does not have much money.
But they feel happy, and they love each other.
Tanjiro often smiles at everyone he meets.
People in the town trust this honest boy.
The snow is falling heavily on the dark mountain.
Tanjiro is climbing up the path to his home.
He is smelling a strange and frightening smell.
Why is my heart beating so fast? he is thinking.
The red moon is shining above the silent trees.
A cruel demon is attacking his family right now.
Tanjiro is running toward the wooden house.
He is crying as he holds his sister in his arms.
Hold on, Nezuko! I am carrying you to a doctor!
The cold wind is blowing through the dark forest.
That terrible night, a demon killed almost all of his family.
Tanjiro found his family lying in the white snow.
He carried Nezuko on his back and ran for help.
Suddenly, Nezuko became a demon and attacked him.
He fell down, but he did not give up.
Deep inside, Nezuko knew her brother and stopped.
A single tear fell from her eye.
Tanjiro held her tightly and spoke softly.
A swordsman saw them and walked closer.
That night changed his life forever.
While Tanjiro was protecting Nezuko, a swordsman appeared.
Giyu was holding his sword, ready to strike.
The snow was falling quietly around them.
Tanjiro was begging the man to spare his sister.
While the two were arguing, Nezuko was standing in front of him.
Her body was shaking, but she was not attacking the humans.
Giyu was watching the demon girl very carefully.
He was wondering what kind of demon she was.
The wind was blowing while they were talking.
At that moment, Tanjiro was crying and shouting together.
I will turn Nezuko back into a human, Tanjiro promised.
Giyu said, You are going to find a man named Urokodaki.
I will not give up, no matter what happens.
One day, I am going to become a Demon Slayer.
I will find the demon who hurt my family.
I am going to train hard every single day.
We will protect each other, Nezuko.
The journey will be long and dangerous.
I am going to grow stronger than anyone.
I promise I will bring back your smile.
Tanjiro has trained under Urokodaki for almost two years.
He has climbed the mountain a thousand times.
Have you ever cut a giant rock with a sword?
I have learned the ten forms of Water Breathing.
He has never stopped, even when his body hurt.
I have already become much stronger than before.
Tanjiro has met two kind spirits, Sabito and Makomo.
They have helped him improve his skills.
Finally, he has cut the great rock in two.
My training has made me ready for the Final Selection.
On Mount Fujikasane, the demons are more dangerous than anywhere else.
This demon is taller and stronger than Tanjiro.
But Tanjiro is faster and smarter than the demon expects.
His sword is sharper than the demon's claws.
This night is darker than any night before.
Tanjiro is braver now than he was two years ago.
Surviving here is harder than climbing the mountain.
The older demon is more powerful than the younger ones.
Tanjiro's will is stronger than his fear.
I must be more careful than ever, he thought.
The Hand Demon was the scariest enemy Tanjiro had ever met.
I have eaten the most students of Urokodaki, it laughed.
It had the longest arms and the sharpest claws.
Tanjiro used the strongest move he knew.
It was the hardest battle of his life.
That night was the darkest and the coldest.
He became the bravest warrior on the mountain.
Water Breathing is one of the most beautiful sword styles.
Tanjiro was the youngest fighter to survive that year.
This was the happiest moment after years of hard training.
I can use all ten forms of Water Breathing now.
When he was younger, he could not hold his breath for long.
Could you teach me the next form, master?
Nezuko can sleep for many days to recover her strength.
A Demon Slayer can sense a demon by its smell.
Can you protect the people while I fight?
Tanjiro could already cut a falling leaf in half.
Anyone can become strong if they never stop training.
Demons cannot walk under the bright sun.
Could I rest for a moment? he asked politely.
As a Demon Slayer, you must protect humans with your life.
You have to wear the uniform and carry a Nichirin sword.
You must not let any demon hurt the people.
You should rest well before every mission.
We must keep Nezuko a secret from the Corps.
A slayer has to be brave, even when afraid.
You don't have to fight alone; your friends will help.
You should always listen to the Hashira.
We must reach the village before sunset.
You must never break the rules of the Corps.
After the battle, Tanjiro was taken to the Butterfly Estate.
His deep wounds were treated by Shinobu and her helpers.
Special medicine is made here from rare mountain flowers.
The whole garden is filled with beautiful butterflies.
Tanjiro was trained again once his body grew strong.
New techniques were taught by the gentle girls.
The estate is known for healing injured slayers.
Many lives have been saved by Shinobu's medicine.
You will be tested before your next mission.
The demons must be defeated before more people are hurt.
Tanjiro fights to save his sister and every innocent person.
I want to become strong enough to defeat Muzan.
Zenitsu was too scared to move, but he still tried.
We need to work together to survive this mission.
He decided to follow the smell of the demon.
Nezuko learned to fight to protect humans, not eat them.
I hope to find a way to cure my sister.
It is important to stay calm in a battle.
They stopped to rest under a tall tree.
I promise to never give up on you.
Running through the forest is Inosuke's favorite thing.
Zenitsu hates fighting, but he is amazing while sleeping.
Tanjiro is good at smelling the threads of a demon.
I enjoy helping people, Tanjiro said with a smile.
Inosuke loves climbing trees and shouting loudly.
They practiced breathing every single morning.
Zenitsu kept complaining about the long journey.
Thank you for saving my life, a villager said.
Eating delicious food made Inosuke calm down.
They never stopped becoming better swordsmen.
Rengoku is the Flame Hashira who never lets his heart burn out.
On the train which carried hundreds of people, a demon was hiding.
He fought the demon that attacked the passengers all night.
The man whose words Tanjiro never forgot smiled warmly.
A passenger is a person who travels on a train.
The fire which Rengoku created lit up the dark night.
Tanjiro met a warrior who taught him about courage.
The dreams that the demon showed them were not real.
Rengoku protected everyone who was on the train.
Set your heart ablaze, said the hero whom they admired.
Tengen is loud and flashy, but he is also a brilliant fighter.
The team could fight together or split up to search.
The demon was very strong, but the slayers refused to run.
Daki was dangerous, so the friends worked as one team.
Tanjiro searched the streets, and Zenitsu searched the houses.
They were very tired, but they did not stop.
Should they go left or right at the dark corner?
The night was long, so everyone stayed alert.
Tengen shouted orders, and his partners fought bravely.
They could win, or they could lose everything.
Because Muzan grew stronger, the Corps prepared for the final war.
Although the slayers were tired, they kept training every day.
When the night came, the demons would rise again.
Tanjiro stayed calm even though he felt afraid inside.
Because Nezuko could resist the sun, she gave everyone hope.
The Hashira gathered when the moon was full.
Although they had lost friends, they did not lose hope.
When Muzan appeared, the real battle began.
They trained hard because the enemy was so powerful.
Even though the path was dark, they walked forward together.
If we work together, we will defeat Muzan, said the Hashira.
If the sun rises before he dies, Muzan will burn to ashes.
You will lose your life if you make one mistake.
If we do not give up, the morning will come for everyone.
If you protect the people, they will trust the Corps.
We will reach him if we follow this path.
If Nezuko helps us, we will have a real chance.
If the demons win tonight, the world will fall into darkness.
I will fight until the end if my friends stand with me.
If you believe in yourself, you will find the strength.
If I were stronger, I would protect everyone.
If we had more time, we would save more lives.
If Rengoku were here, he would tell us to set our hearts ablaze.
If I weren't afraid, I would smile like him.
If the sun never set, demons would not exist.
If I had his courage, I would never run away.
If we knew Muzan's weakness, we would win easily.
If you were in my place, what would you do?
If I could turn back time, I would save my family.
If everyone helped, the world would be a kinder place.
The slayers needed to know where Muzan was hiding.
Do you know when he will appear? Tanjiro asked Tamayo.
Nobody understood why he hated humans so much.
Can you tell me how we can defeat him?
Tamayo explained what the demon king feared most.
I wonder who created the very first demon.
They asked where the secret medicine was kept.
Tell me what I should do to help my sister.
No one knew how long the final battle would last.
Please tell me where my courage comes from.
After the final battle, the sun rose at last. We won, didn't we?
Nezuko is human again, isn't she? he asked with tears.
You won't forget our friends, will you? Zenitsu said softly.
We can finally live in peace, can't we?
Muzan is truly gone, isn't he? someone whispered.
You will remember the fallen, won't you?
We fought bravely, didn't we? Inosuke grinned.
Nezuko didn't lose herself, did she?
The morning is beautiful, isn't it?
Let's protect this peace together, shall we?
